question: In F1, the power unit (PU) architecture by 2026 includes a hybrid system with which of the following components?

options: ES (Energy Store) High-voltage lithium-ion battery pack

question: What does the MGU-K (Motor Generator Unit - Kinetic) provide in F1 cars by 2026?
options: A turbocharged engine limited to 15,000 RPM
High-voltage lithium-ion battery pack storing recovered energy

question: In F1 cars, the Power Unit (PU) hybrid system by 2026 includes a power split of _____% Internal Combustion and _____% Electrical.

What is the purpose of the World Constructors' Championship (WCC) in Formula 1 racing?
A) To award points to individual drivers based on their performance
B) To determine which team has the best overall performance across both car constructors over a season
C) To decide who gets to design and build the race cars independently of any other aspect
D) To recognize the fastest lap times in all races

Which of the following statements is true about FIA's role in Formula 1?
A) FIA establishes technical, sporting, and financial regulations for Formula 1.
B) FIA only manages the logistics during competitions.
C) FIA controls all aspects of car design and construction.
D) FIA awards points to drivers based on their performance.

What does the 'Constructor Trophy' signify in Formula 1 competitions?
A) It is awarded to the team with the highest total points accumulated by both of its cars over a season.
B) It recognizes the best-performing driver individually across all teams.
C) It rewards the team that has the most successful rookie drivers.
D) It indicates the fastest qualifying time for constructors.

A) High-speed corners on dry circuits
B) Heavy rain with significant water accumulation on tracks
